content:
Ninu ilana iṣọkan idakẹjẹ meji-ọna (two-way silent substitution protocol) fun awọn alaisan ICU ti o wa lori ẹrọ atẹgun, igbohunsafẹfẹ asopọ-ipele akọkọ (primary level connection frequency) jẹ pataki lati ṣetọju iduroṣinṣin ninu iṣakoso awọn oogun ati idinku awọn ipa ẹgbẹ.

Nigbati o ba n yipada lati propofol si dexmedetomidine, iṣiro igbohunsafẹfẹ asopọ-ipele akọkọ maa n da lori awọn ifosiwewe wọnyi:

1. **Iwọn lilo lọwọlọwọ ti propofol:** A gbọdọ mọ iwọn lilo lọwọlọwọ ti propofol ti alaisan n gba, pẹlu akoko ti o ti gba oogun naa.

2. **Ipa pharmacokinetic ati pharmacodynamic:** Propofol ati dex
